syntaxReference: for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { /* body */ }

break; // exits nearest loop
continue; // skips to next iteration
commonPatterns: Counter-controlled loop: int count = 0; for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { count++; }
Accumulate sum/average: int sum = 0; for (int x : arr) { sum += x; } double avg = (arr.length>0)? (double)sum/arr.length : 0.0;
Find max/min: int max = Integer.MIN_VALUE; for (int x : arr) { if (x > max) max = x; }
Sentinel input: while ((x = scan.nextInt()) != -1) { /* process x */ }
Nested loops grid: for (int r=0;r<rows;r++){ for(int c=0;c<cols;c++){ System.out.print("*"); } System.out.println(); }
quickTips: Prefer i < array.length over i <= array.length to avoid IndexOutOfBoundsException.
Ensure each loop makes progress toward termination (update counters or state every iteration).
Keep loop bodies small; extract helper methods for clarity and testability.
